description: A hydrologist needs to isolate survey points below the 100-year flood stage elevation to calibrate a hydraulic model. Using the survey point file at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\foothills_creek_survey.csv', identify all points with an elevation (Z coordinate) strictly less than 1845.000 meters. Create a new layer named 'ZONA_INUNDABLE' with the color Red (Rojo) and assign the identified points to it. Export the points on the 'ZONA_INUNDABLE' layer to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\flood_points.csv' and save the TopoCal project to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\flood_project.tcl'.
